topic: Cytokine storm: when immune response becomes dangerous
caption: Did you know your immune system can sometimes overreact? 🤯 A cytokine storm is when your body's defense mechanism becomes too aggressive, leading to tissue damage and even organ failure. 💔 Here are the facts: cytokines are small proteins that help fight off infections, but in a storm, they're released in excess, causing inflammation and damage. 🌪️ It can be triggered by severe infections, autoimmune disorders, or even cancer. 🎗️ Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💖
